# Starlight on the Path
## Scripture
"For you are my lamp, O Lord; the Lord turns my darkness into light." - 2 Samuel 22:29

## Reflection
As we walk through the Spring season, the night sky presents us with a breathtaking canvas of twinkling stars. The gentle glow of these celestial bodies reminds us of God's promise to illuminate our path, even in the darkest of times. Just as the stars shine bright in the vast expanse of the universe, God's presence in our lives can turn our darkness into light. The stars serve as a reminder that we are not alone in our journey, and that God's sovereignty extends far beyond the reaches of our understanding.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we gaze upon the starry night sky, we are reminded of your faithfulness to guide us through life's challenges. Help us to trust in your sovereignty and to seek your presence in the darkest of times. May the starlight on our path symbolize the hope and light that you bring to our lives. Illuminate our way, O Lord, and may we reflect your light to a world in need. Amen.
